rows.boundary: Consumer SNP files may miss CYP2D6 copy number, deletion, duplication, hybrid alleles, and star-allele phasing.
rows.userMisreadRisk: Reader may treat consumer SNP data as clinical CYP2D6 null genotyping.

rows.boundary: CYP2D6 genotype does not decide medication changes by itself.
rows.userMisreadRisk: Reader may over-convert a model row into personal medical interpretation.

rows.boundary: A systemic-null framing does not mean CYP2D6 null status is already a formal disease diagnosis.
rows.userMisreadRisk: Reader may over-convert a model row into personal medical interpretation.

rows.boundary: Drug inhibitors, liver function, age, dose, and co-medications can dominate the functional phenotype.
rows.userMisreadRisk: Reader may over-convert a model row into personal medical interpretation.

rows.boundary: Do not treat an app-level CYP2D6 call as clinical genotyping.
rows.userMisreadRisk: Reader may treat consumer SNP data as clinical CYP2D6 null genotyping.

rows.boundary: Ultrarapid CYP2D6 is an opposite-function state, not a null. It may be useful contrast, but it does not belong in the Nulls core model.
rows.userMisreadRisk: Reader may treat ultrarapid or duplication states as nulls.
